gui.category.chat.compact_chat.name: Compact Chat
gui.category.chat.compact_chat_time.name: Compact Chat Duration
gui.category.chat.compact_chat_time.desc: time in seconds during which duplicate messages are merged.
gui.category.visuals.etherwarp_outline.d: shows an outline of the Etherwarp destination.
gui.category.visuals.etherwarp_outline.w: change the outline width for etherwarping.
gui.category.visuals.etherwarp_outline.v: change the color used for a valid etherwarp.
gui.category.visuals.etherwarp_outline.i: change the color used for a invalid etherwarp.
